config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent Indonesia vs China native-or-English block. Each persona speaks only English or its own native language.
config.cell_description: One-side-native cross cell: Indonesia persona speaks Indonesian; China persona speaks English.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: One-side-native cross cell: Indonesia persona speaks Indonesian; China persona speaks English.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: DISAGREE. Menurut saya, kepentingan masyarakat memang penting, tetapi tidak boleh otomatis mengalahkan hak individu, karena hak individu adalah batas agar kekuasaan tidak semena-mena dan mayoritas tidak menindas minoritas. Dari pengalaman saya, kalau “demi masyarakat” dipakai terlalu longgar, yang sering terjadi justru hak orang kecil dikorbankan tanpa perlindungan yang adil. Saya lebih setuju bahwa kepentingan bersama dan hak individu harus seimbang, dengan pembatasan hak hanya jika benar-benar perlu dan proporsional.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: The interests of society should not automatically take priority over the rights of the individual. From my perspective as someone from China, I understand why people stress social stability, collective goals, and public order, because those priorities are deeply familiar and often genuinely useful in daily life. But I do not think “society first” should become a blank check to override individual rights, because once that happens, it is easy for ordinary people to lose protection and have no clear boundary against abuse. A healthy society should balance both, and the burden should be on proving that any restriction on individual rights is necessary, limited, and truly serves the public good.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Kepentingan masyarakat memang penting, tetapi saya tidak setuju kalau itu harus otomatis diprioritaskan di atas hak individu. Dari pengalaman saya di Indonesia, alasan “demi kepentingan umum” sering dipakai untuk membenarkan keputusan yang justru merugikan orang kecil, jadi hak individu perlu tetap jadi pagar agar kekuasaan tidak kebablasan. Kalau ada pembatasan hak, harus benar-benar jelas tujuannya, proporsional, dan bisa dipertanggungjawabkan, bukan sekadar karena mayoritas menginginkannya. Menurut saya, masyarakat yang sehat bukan yang selalu mengalahkan individu, tetapi yang mampu melindungi keduanya secara adil.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: The interests of society should not take automatic priority over the rights of the individual. From my perspective as someone from China, I understand why many people value social stability and collective outcomes, but I have also seen how easily “for the public good” can become a broad excuse that leaves ordinary people with little protection. Individual rights are not a luxury; they are the boundary that prevents power, whether from the state or the majority, from going too far. Society works best when it can justify any restriction clearly, narrowly, and only when it is truly necessary.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus didahulukan secara otomatis di atas hak individu. Sebagai orang Indonesia, saya justru melihat betapa sering alasan “demi kepentingan umum” dipakai untuk menekan orang kecil, padahal yang paling butuh perlindungan justru mereka yang tidak punya kuasa. Hak individu itu bukan penghalang bagi masyarakat, melainkan batas agar mayoritas dan penguasa tidak semena-mena. Kalau ada pembatasan, harus benar-benar perlu, proporsional, dan bisa diuji secara adil, bukan sekadar karena terdengar baik untuk kepentingan bersama.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: The interests of society should not take priority over the rights of the individual as a general rule. From my perspective as someone from China, I understand the appeal of social stability and collective goals, but I do not trust “the public good” when it is used as a broad excuse to silence ordinary people or ignore fairness. Individual rights are the line that keeps power from becoming arbitrary, and without that line, even well-intended policies can harm people who have the least voice. Society should be able to limit rights only when the need is real, the scope is narrow, and the decision can be clearly justified.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
